title: Are you tired of bulk editing subtasks one item at a time? 🤯

posts.author: andrewp (Andrzej P)
posts.cookedHtml:
With Bulk Item & Subitem Editor, you can update multiple subitems across different items in just a few clicks—saving you time and effort!

What you can do right now:
Bulk update assignees, deadlines, statuses, and text across multiple items & subitems.
Filter subitems and apply targeted changes with precision.
Keep your board clean by replacing texts like ‘(copy)’.

COMING SOON: We’re excited to share that a new feature is on the way—soon, you’ll be able to copy values from one column to another, even from an item to its subitem!

What’s your biggest frustration when bulk editing on monday.com? We’d love to hear your thoughts—let us know in the comments if there’s anything you’d like our tool to do!

Try it free today – visit our app listing page to start your 14-day free trial!
Have feedback? We’d love to hear from you at team@apmdsoft.com
